subtasks.description: Generate SQL to calculate average cost per active seat by product for Q4 2024, sorted descending by average cost per seat. Query will aggregate spend/cost data from the SaaS warehouse, filter for Q4 2024 dates, group by product, and compute avg(total_cost / active_seats).

plan.cost_rationale: Single sql_gen subtask (mid tier) sufficient: requires multi-table join (likely cost/spend table with seat/usage data), filtering by date range, aggregation with division operation, and sorting. Mid tier handles moderately complex aggregation logic. Only one database query needed. No cross-source reconciliation, extraction, or policy logic required.

output.sql: SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(daily_active_seats), 0) AS avg_cost_per_seat FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY product ORDER BY avg_cost_per_seat DESC
